text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Those around me offer a lot of support as I
prepare for the Oka Sho. Sky comes to check on
me, too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, after entering my classic year, I
became fast enough to attract even Sakura
Bakushin O's attention!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yamanin Zephyr also tells me I'm like the wind! I
couldn't ask for higher praise from her! ♪ Now I
feel more than ready to take on the Oka Sho!
